午后的魔物联邦人来人往
“轰”
“哇哈哈哈！阿辰放弃吧！你是抓不到我哒”
米莉姆掐着小腰一脸嚣张的对着空中的青年挑衅道。
“米莉姆你居然又偷吃利姆露的布丁，她又来我这告状啦！”
天空中的青年无奈的扶着额头对着下方的米莉姆问道。
“哼哼！我可是魔王哒，哇哈哈哈！”
就在米莉姆掐着腰嚣张的时候，身后突然出现了一位身着女仆装，手拿怀表的银发少女面无表情的说道：
“米莉姆大人！您要是再继续胡闹，您这三天的布丁我就没收了!”
听到声音的米莉姆身体一僵，缓缓的回头望去，略带尴尬的对着身后的少女说道：
“咲夜！你听我解释！事情不是这样的，都是利姆露的错，对，都是她的错！！”
听到米莉姆不知悔改的话语，少女伸手拽住米莉姆衣领拖着她朝着外面走去。
“唉唉唉！！！我知道错了！！阿辰救我啊！！”
路旁看着这一幕的人纷纷出声
“这是这个月第几次了”
“第五次了，我们鬼杀队都快成修路队了！”
“不错了，我们更惨，前段时间米莉姆大人去海贼世界玩，直接轰沉了一座岛，因为这事赤犬元帅砸烂了好几张办公桌”
“听说忍界那边.....”
青年崩溃大喊：“米莉姆！我的和平啊！”","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/5b615c066c456a8ed888af802d831037","author":"采炮弹的汤姆猫","author_id":"","book_id":"7495681869090933822","book_name":"次元之城？不，是遗憾弥补中心哒","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#101010","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"1.4万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":718,"name":"动漫衍生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=718&name=动漫衍生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":91,"name":"多女主","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=91&name=多女主&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":384,"name":"无敌","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=384&name=无敌&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":465,"name":"综漫","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=465&name=综漫&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1079,"name":"衍生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1079&name=衍生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7496128367691825726","read_count":"13515","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"1451300"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"8.0","serial_count":"664","tags":"动漫衍生,穿越,多女主,无敌,综漫,衍生","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/40b80692323cbed75c3ec96bf4817c15~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779364664&x-signature=p1WVKUdzcW1GNN11E6F3yD7wcYs%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"927625841747668","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"42"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260322195744D46475C4719058B3B4B8"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读4小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":4,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":2627,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":15619,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":3051},"user_action":{"author":0,"author_digg_time":1752313848,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7507295154974622526","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"嗯，很温馨日常的小白诸天文。
可以一看的。

和普通的小白文一样，特点就是写得剧情不够有层次，重要剧情也混混，次要剧情又有点详细。主角也没有比较明显的人格特色，就是经典款亚撒西。就很中规中矩的文，没有毒点已经是很优质了。

建议的话，推荐芙丽莲的世界吧，还有素晴，地下城。或许可以乱入一点少女乐队，或者漫威（如果想攀战力），火影感化什么的，哈利也可以。总之可以加点喜欢的，试错成本也不高，毕竟基调是升级和温柔日常，主世界利姆露。毒的可能除非作者想kill掉几个人气角色，不然不可能暴死。
毕竟受众已定，对于我来说，升级升慢点也可以，最好是旅行日常几个世界。升级是次要的，温柔和角色互动，角色塑造才是大头。能ooc好一个角色才能留住人，比如那些用角色模板的同人作品。","text_exts":[{"e":135,"s":132,"text":"地下城","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E5%9C%B0%E4%B8%8B%E5%9F%8E&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%23177418066458B3B4B8%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227507295154974622526%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227495681869090933822%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E5%9C%B0%E4%B8%8B%E5%9F%8E%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1747931165,"group_id":"7495681869090933822","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"看太多小说了，现在一直在赤石。","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N1/gx+qVvYqj3J+9lORvSHiq/FEWHmdZ28vZ0deAfJ5q","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/0c186acd48db4f7da72a9f03ab0c33cd~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776708029&x-signature=VeOB2AP%2BW2PS6fQuzimeM7MFlAU%3D","user_id":"3142844643551299","user_name":"超级无敌的猫猫仙人"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"3142844643551299","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7495681869090933822","book_info":{"abstract":"【综漫】+【主世界转生史莱姆】+【种田】+【多女主】+【主角无敌】+【拯救动漫遗憾】
